_comment: The founder-story funnel. type: VALUE = pure usefulness, no app. INTRO = personal/founder/build-in-public. SOFT_APP = honest, disclosed app mention. COMMUNITY = question to spark replies. Weeks 1-2 establish trust; weeks 3-4 run the ongoing 70/20/10 mix. Add weekN keys freely — the engine reads them all.

week1.topic: Hello — who I am and why I'm here
week1.brief: Short founder intro. I work in disability support, I'm here to share useful stuff for sole traders. No pitch. Invite people to say hi.

week1.topic: The 3 admin tasks that quietly eat your week
week1.brief: Practical breakdown + one tip for each. Pure value.

week1.topic: What's the most confusing part of the NDIS price guide for you?
week1.brief: Open question. Reply to every comment personally.

week1.topic: A clean progress-note structure that survives an audit
week1.brief: Give away an actual template/structure. No strings. Never say 'audit-proof' or 'guarantees compliance'.

week2.topic: Getting paid faster: invoicing + claims checklist
The admin night that made me start building something
week2.brief: Honest founder story — the pain that started it. Still no hard pitch.

week2.topic: Solo support work can be isolating — how do you stay connected?
What I've been building — want to be first to try it?
week2.brief: Disclosed, PRE-LAUNCH invite. 'I built this, here's what it does, it's not out yet — would love a few providers to shape it and be first in line.' NO live product link yet; invite to register interest / DM. Honest it's still being readied for market.

week3.topic: Travel and the bits people forget to claim
week3.brief: Provider travel, non-labour km, short-notice cancellations — always per the CURRENT pricing arrangements. Keep a travel log as you go. No guarantees, point to official guide.

week3.topic: Capturing notes during a shift, not at 9pm
week3.brief: Capture-now-polish-later. Generic tools (voice memo, notes app, paper). Three bullets beat a blank page. No app pitch.

week3.topic: What eats your week that has nothing to do with actual support?
week3.brief: Open question on time-wasters. Reply personally.

week3.topic: Build-in-public: the feedback that changed what I'm building
week3.brief: Honest build-in-public. A worker's comment reshaped a Caira decision. Pre-launch, still shaping it. End with a question.

week4.brief: Quick respectful-language guide; ask the person how they describe themselves. Offer the one-page cheat-sheet lead magnet. Pure value.
Calm, factual: what/when/who/what you did/who you told. Observable facts only. Know your provider's reporting timeframes. No guarantees.

week4.topic: Best advice you got when you started as a support worker?
week4.brief: Community wisdom for new workers. Reply personally.

week4.topic: Caira update — early feedback is making it sharper
week4.brief: Disclosed pre-launch update. Early providers giving feedback; tagline sign-off. Taking a few more to shape it. Comment/DM. No cost.
